description: Register a new Institution named 'PetroChem Occupational Health Clinic' in GNU Health. Create a Hospital Ward named 'Decontamination & Observation Ward' linked to this institution, and two Hospital Beds named 'DECON-1' and 'DECON-2' linked to the ward. Access the system at http://localhost:8000/ (Username: admin, Password: gnusolidario).
